title: Our lab received a research gift from Adobe Research. Thank you for supporting our work!
Our lab received funding by the Swiss AI initiative large project call to work on multimodal AI tutor for early math and programming education, together with the LRE lab.
For ETH students: We have updated the thesis project list for Spring 2026.
We have two opening positions for doctoral students and one position for research intern. Join us!
Welcome to our new member, Yang Wu! Yang is a doctorate student joining from the ETH-EPFL joint degree program of learning science.
Xiaotian Su and April Wang are traveling to the CSCW conference in Bergen. Xiaotian is presenting her paper on emotional monitoring. Read our blog post.
Our paper SPARK: Real-Time Monitoring of Multi-Faceted Programming Exercises won the best paper honorable mention at VL/HCC 2025. Congrats Yinuo Yang and co-authors! Read our blog post.

Our lab has been awarded funding by the Swiss National Science Foundation (SNSF) through the 2025 Project Funding call and we are likely to have openings for PhD and Predoc positions soon. Stay tuned!
Welcome to our new member, Bhada Yun! Bhada is a direct doctorate student co-advised by Prof Wang and Prof El-Assady.
New thesis project list released.
Welcome to our new team members, Dr. Goswami and Dr. Do!
Junling Wang is presenting generative visuals for math word problems at ACL 2025.
Lilian Lopez is presenting the datar project at ITiCSE 2025.
PEACH Lab at CHI 2025, Yokohama: three paper presentations and one poster. Come say hi!
Welcome to our new team members, Xiaotian Su, Junling Wang, and Zeyu Xiong!
